---
applyTo: "CalendarParse.Cli/Services/**"
---

When editing any service file in this directory as part of an experiment:

1. **Before editing**: check `.github/docs/next-session-plan.md` "Anti-Patterns" section to confirm this approach hasn't already been tried and failed.
2. **After a benchmark run**: update `.github/docs/experiment-log.md` (summary table row + narrative) and `.github/docs/next-session-plan.md` (score, remaining errors, any new anti-patterns).
3. **If reverting**: still document the experiment — reverted phases are equally valuable data.
